description: Resource type definition for AWS::SageMaker::TransformJob. A transform job uses a trained model to get inferences on a dataset and saves these results to an Amazon S3 location that you specify.

TransformJobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transform job.
TransformJobArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transform job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z\-]*:sagemaker:[a-z0-9\-]*:[0-9]{12}:transform-job/  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TransformJobName.description: The name of the transform job. The name must be unique within an AWS Region in an AWS account.
TransformJobName.markdownDescription:
The name of the transform job. The name must be unique within an AWS Region in an AWS account.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 63  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,62}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TransformJobStatus.description: The status of the transform job.
TransformJobStatus.markdownDescription:
The status of the transform job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: InProgress | Completed | Failed | Stopping | Stopped  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ModelName.description: The name of the model that you want to use for the transform job.
ModelName.markdownDescription:
The name of the model that you want to use for the transform job.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 63  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]([\-a-zA-Z0-9]*[a-zA-Z0-9])?$  
Update requires: Replacement

MaxConcurrentTransforms.description: The maximum number of parallel requests that can be sent to each instance in a transform job.
MaxConcurrentTransforms.markdownDescription:
The maximum number of parallel requests that can be sent to each instance in a transform job.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: Replacement

ModelClientConfig.description: Configures the timeout and maximum number of retries for processing a transform job invocation.

InvocationsTimeoutInSeconds.description: The timeout value in seconds for an invocation request.
InvocationsTimeoutInSeconds.markdownDescription:
The timeout value in seconds for an invocation request.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

InvocationsMaxRetries.description: The maximum number of retries when invocation requests are failing.
InvocationsMaxRetries.markdownDescription:
The maximum number of retries when invocation requests are failing.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelClientConfig.markdownDescription:
Configures the timeout and maximum number of retries for processing a transform job invocation.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: Replacement

MaxPayloadInMB.description: The maximum allowed size of the payload, in MB.
MaxPayloadInMB.markdownDescription:
The maximum allowed size of the payload, in MB.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: Replacement

BatchStrategy.description: Specifies the number of records to include in a mini-batch for an HTTP inference request.
BatchStrategy.markdownDescription:
Specifies the number of records to include in a mini-batch for an HTTP inference request.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: MultiRecord | SingleRecord  
Update requires: Replacement

[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*.markdownDescription:

Maximum Length: 10240
